name: Hot Pepper Relish
recipeIngredient: 3 cups finely chopped red bell peppers (about 1 1/2 pounds)
1 cup finely chopped yellow bell pepper
1 teaspoon crushed red pepper flakes (up to 2)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heavy saucepan, combine the chopped peppers, onions, cider vinegar, sugar, mustard seed, and salt.
2. Bring the mixture to a simmer.
3. Cook, stirring occasionally, for about 1 hour, or until reduced to approximately 3 cups.
4. Allow the relish to cool before serving.
5. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 1 month.
